# Современный дизайн для старого сайта (2026-02-21 00:32Z)

_**User**_

Ты - эксперт по веб-дизайну, умеешь оценивать дизайн чужих сайтов и знаешь как их можно освежить/переделать под современные направления в дизайне.

Вот референс: https://www.tiglev.com/  моего старого сайта. 
Скриншоты страниц приложил.

Изучи этот сайт и предложи новый дизайн, а также сгенерируй MVP, чтобы я мог запустить и посмотреть сразу.

---

_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants me to analyze their old website (tiglev.com - a car dealership) and propose a modern redesign, then generate an MVP. Let me first explore the current workspace to understand what's already there, and also analyze the screenshots they provided.

Let me look at the screenshots and the current codebase structure first.</details></think>

SpecStory Artifacts Directory\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nThis directory is automatically created and maintained by the SpecStory extension to preserve your AI chat history.\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n## What's Here?\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/history&#96;: Contains auto-saved markdown files of your AI coding sessions (default path, configurable in &#96;specstory.outputPath&#96; setting)\\\\\\\\n    - Each file represents a separate AI chat session\\\\\\\\n    - If you enable auto-save, files are automatically updated as you work\\\\\\\\n    - You can enable/disable the auto-save feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/.project.json&#96;: Contains the persistent project identity for the current workspace\\\\\\\\n    - This file is only present if you enable AI rules derivation\\\\\\\\n    - This is used to provide consistent project identity of your project, even as the workspace is moved or renamed\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/ai_rules_backups&#96;: Contains backups of the &#96;.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc&#96; or the &#96;.github/copilot-instructions.md&#96; file\\\\\\\\n    - Backups are automatically created each time the &#96;.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc&#96; or the &#96;.github/copilot-instructions.md&#96; file is updated\\\\\\\\n    - You can enable/disable the AI Rules derivation feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default\\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/.gitignore&#96;: Contains directives to exclude non-essential contents of the &#96;.specstory&#96; directory from version control\\\\\\\\n    - Add &#96;/history&#96; to exclude the auto-saved chat history from version control\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Valuable Uses\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n- Capture: Keep your context window up-to-date when starting new Chat/Composer sessions via @ references\\\\\\\\n- Search: For previous prompts and code snippets \\\\\\\\n- Learn: Meta-analyze your patterns and learn from your past experiences\\\\\\\\n- Derive: Keep the AI on course with your past decisions by automatically deriving rules from your AI interactions\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n## Version Control\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nWe recommend keeping this directory under version control to maintain a history of your AI interactions. However, if you prefer not to version these files, you can exclude them by adding this to your &#96;.gitignore&#96;:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/**\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nWe recommend __not__ keeping the &#96;.specstory/ai_rules_backups&#96; directory under version control if you are already using git to version your AI rules, and committing regularly. You can exclude it by adding this to your &#96;.gitignore&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/ai_rules_backups\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Searching Your Codebase\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nWhen searching your codebase, search results may include your previous AI coding interactions. To focus solely on your actual code files, you can exclude the AI interaction history from search results.\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nTo exclude AI interaction history:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n1. Open the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Find in Files\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" search in Cursor or VSCode (Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + F)\\\\\\\\n2. Navigate to the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"files to exclude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" section\\\\\\\\n3. Add the following pattern:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n.specstory/*\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nThis will ensure your searches only return results from your working codebase files.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Notes\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Auto-save only works when Cursor or VSCode flushes sqlite database data to disk. This results in a small delay after the AI response is complete before SpecStory can save the history.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Settings\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nYou can control auto-saving behavior in Cursor or VSCode:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n1. Open Cursor/Code → Settings → VS Code Settings (Cmd/Ctrl + ,)\\\\\\\\n2. Search for \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SpecStory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n3. Find \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Auto Save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" setting to enable/disable\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nAuto-save occurs when changes are detected in the sqlite database, or every 2 minutes as a safety net.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":69}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/stiglev/tiglevcom/.specstory/.what-is-this.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# SpecStory Artifacts Directory\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\nThis directory is automatically created and maintained by the SpecStory extension to preserve your AI chat history.\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n## What's Here?\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n- &#96;.specstory/history&#96;: Contains auto-saved markdown files of your AI coding sessions (default path, configurable in &#96;specstory.outputPath&#96; Now I have a good understanding of the old website. Let me analyze it:

**Current site (tiglev.com) - Car Dealership in Tolyatti, Russia:**
- Dark background with red accents
- Sells used cars, offers buyback service, cars from Europe
- Has a car catalog with filters (price, brand, body type)
- Contact info: +7 (8482) 750-750, 8-800-500-0015
- Located in Tolyatti, Ofitserskaya st. 46, GSK 66
- Services: Car sales, buyback, European imports, commission sales


- Carries brands like KIA, LADA, Land Rover, BMW

The site has several design problems—it's stuck in a 2010s aesthetic with an outdated dark theme, cluttered navigation, poor typography hierarchy, and small car images. The search functionality feels visually messy, the footer is cramped, and there's no mobile responsiveness. I'm thinking a modern redesign should move toward a clean, light theme with better typography, larger high-quality imagery, and strategic dark accents.

For the redesign, I'll keep the red brand identity but modernize everything else—card-based catalog layout, cleaner search and filtering, mobile-first responsive design, better whitespace, and smooth animations. I'm planning to build this with Next.js 14 and TailwindCSS, starting from scratch with mock data. The structure will include a hero section, search functionality, car catalog, services, contacts, and footer—all with a modern, minimal aesthetic.</details></think>

  "plan": "# Редизайн сайта Tiglev.com — MVP\n\n## Концепция дизайна\n\n**Стиль:** Чистый, светлый, минимализм с акцентами фирменного красного.\nВдохновение: современные автосалоны (Carvana, AutoTrader, Авто.ру).\n\n**Палитра:**\n- Фон: белый (#FFFFFF) + светло-серый (#F8FAFC)\n- Основной акцент: фирменный красный (#C41E24) — из оригинального лого\n- Тёмный текст: (#1E293B)\n- Серый текст: (#64748B)\n- Тёмные секции: (#0F172A) — для hero и футера\n\n**Типографика:** Inter (Google Fonts) — чистый, современный шрифт\n\n**Ключевые принципы:**\n- Mobile-first responsive\n- Большие качественные изображения\n- Много воздуха (whitespace)\n- Карточный UI для каталога\n- Плавные hover-анимации\n- Чёткая визуальная иерархия\n\n## Структура страницы (Single Page MVP)\n\n### 1. Header (фиксированный)\n- Логотип TIGLEV слева\n- Навигация по центру: О компании, Каталог, Выкуп авто, На заказ, Контакты\n- Телефон + CTA кнопка \"Написать нам\" справа\n- Blur-фон при скролле\n\n### 2. Hero Section\n- Полноширинный блок с тёмным gradient overlay\n- Крупный заголовок: \"Автомобили с пробегом в Тольятти\"\n- Подзаголовок с описанием\n- Встроенная форма быстрого поиска (марка, цена, кузов)\n- Фоновое изображение (placeholder via Unsplash)\n\n### 3. Услуги (3 карточки)\n- Продажа авто\n- Выкуп автомобилей\n- Авто на заказ из Европы\n- Каждая карточка: иконка + заголовок + краткое описание + CTA\n\n### 4. Каталог авто\n- Фильтры: вкладки \"Все / Срочно / Элитное\"\n- Сетка карточек 3 колонки (desktop) / 2 (tablet) / 1 (mobile)\n- Каждая карточка: фото, марка/модель, год, цена, badge\n- Кнопка \"Показать ещё\"\n- Моковые данные на основе реальных авто с сайта\n\n### 5. Почему мы (Social proof)\n- Статистика: лет на рынке, продано авто, довольных клиентов\n- Краткие преимущества\n\n### 6. Контакты + Карта\n- Адрес, телефоны, режим работы\n- Placeholder для карты (iframe Яндекс.Карт)\n- Форма обратной связи\n\n### 7. Footer\n- Лого, навигация, контакты, соц.сети\n- Копирайт\n\n## Технический стек\n\n- **Next.js 14** (App Router) — [next.config.js]\n- **TypeScript**\n- **TailwindCSS** — стилизация\n- **Lucide React** — иконки\n- Моковые данные в &#96;data/cars.ts&#96;\n- Без backend, чистый SSG/статика\n\n## Структура файлов\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ntiglevcom/\n  src/\n    app/\n      layout.tsx       — корневой layout, шрифты, metadata\n      page.tsx         — главная страница (собирает секции)\n      globals.css      — Tailwind директивы + кастомные стили\n    components/\n      Header.tsx       — навигация\n      Hero.tsx         — hero-секция с поиском\n      Services.tsx     — блок услуг\n      Catalog.tsx      — каталог авто с фильтрами\n      WhyUs.tsx        — блок преимуществ/статистики\n      Contacts.tsx     — контакты и форма\n      Footer.tsx       — подвал\n      CarCard.tsx      — карточка автомобиля\n    data/\n      cars.ts          — моковые данные автомобилей\n  tailwind.config.ts\n  package.json\n  tsconfig.json\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",

Все задачи выполнены. MVP сайта запущен и работает.

**Открывайте в браузере: http://localhost:3000**

---

**Что сделано:**

- **Header** — фиксированная навигация с логотипом, blur-фоном при скролле, мобильное бургер-меню
- **Hero** — полноэкранная секция с gradient overlay поверх фоновой фотографии, встроенная форма быстрого поиска (марка, цена, кузов)
- **Services** — 3 карточки услуг (продажа, выкуп, заказ из Европы) с hover-анимациями
- **Catalog** — каталог автомобилей с вкладками фильтрации (Все / Срочно / Элитное), сетка карточек 3 колонки, кнопка "Показать ещё", бейджи "Срочно" и "Элитное"
- **WhyUs** — блок статистики (15+ лет, 3000+ авто, 98% клиентов) и 4 карточки преимуществ на тёмном фоне
- **Contacts** — контактная информация (адрес, телефоны, режим работы), placeholder карты, форма обратной связи
- **Footer** — навигация, контакты, ссылка на ВКонтакте, копирайт

**Ключевые отличия от старого сайта:**
- Чистый светлый дизайн вместо тяжёлого тёмного
- Современная типографика Inter
- Фирменный красный (#C41E24) как акцентный цвет
- Полная адаптивность для мобильных устройств
- Карточный UI с hover-анимациями
- Много воздуха и чёткая визуальная иерархия
